_publications._publicationTitle: Integrated Drug Mining Reveals Actionable Strategies Inhibiting Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: The preserved modules from unsupervised analysis independently recapitulate PN tumor biology, providing validation for using this method to direct drug selection
details: Successfully identified consensus gene regulatory network modules among PN cells and primary tumor tissue, with preserved modules independently recapitulating PN tumor biology
